payload.answer: I can help rewrite the memory, but the reference is ambiguous: “the other one” does not identify what preference or item it refers to. Please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: Rewrite the existing memory only after clarifying what “the other one” refers to.
Keep the existing memory unchanged and do not save this ambiguous rewrite.
Replace the existing memory with a clarified version you provide, e.g., “He prefers [specific item] over [other item].”
Add a separate clarified preference memory if this is an additional fact rather than a replacement.
